message:
fix: clippy errors and compilation issues across test files

- Enable test-internals as default feature so integration tests compile
- Fix invalid hex literals (0xDEEP, 0xRACE, etc.) in runtime_e2e.rs
- Fix type mismatch (u32 vs usize) in runtime_e2e.rs
- Fix unused vars, format strings, auto-deref in repro_spawn_panic.rs
- Fix unused import, format strings, semicolons, const position in io_cancellation.rs
- Fix matches! -> is_ok() in e2e_combinator.rs
- Fix unused imports, format strings, redundant clones in grpc_e2e.rs
- Fix OpCode -> Opcode, invalid hex, redundant clones in multi_protocol_e2e.rs
- Fix io::Error::new -> io::Error::other in h2/error.rs
- Add missing trait imports in transport/sink.rs and transport/stream.rs
- Fix borrow-of-moved in transport/tests.rs
- Allow cast_possible_wrap in crdt.rs PNCounter::value()

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
